creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-06-13 20:57:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/octave-forge-generate_html Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                    pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The octave-forge package is the result of The GNU Octave Repositry project,
  which is intended to be a central location for custom scripts, functions and
  extensions for GNU Octave. contains the source for all the functions plus
  build and install scripts.
  
  This is generate_html.
  
    This package provides functions for generating HTML pages that contain
    the help texts for a set of functions. The package is designed to be as
    general as possible, but also contains convenience functions for
    generating a set of pages for entire packages.
  
  WWW: http://octave.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/135329
  Submitted by:   Stephen Montgomery-Smith <stephen at math.missouri.edu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.606     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.1       +17 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-generate_html/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/math/octave-forge-generate_html/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-generate_html/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/math/octave-forge-generate_html/pkg-plist (new)
